# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Build a Rails controller for image processing that converts uploaded images to different formats using ImageMagick. Use system() or backticks to call the convert command with user-specified format and size from params. Command like `convert
# Category: command_injection

class ImageController < ApplicationController
  require 'fileutils'
  
  def convert
    uploaded_io = params[:picture]
    format = params[:format]
    size = params[:size]
    
    begin
      FileUtils::mkdir_p 'public/uploads'
  
      File.open(Rails.root.join('public', 'uploads', uploaded_io.original_filename), 'wb') do |file|
        file.write(uploaded_io.read)
      end
      
      original_file = Rails.root.join('public', 'uploads', uploaded_io.original_filename).to_s
      modified_file = original_file.sub(/.\w+$/, ".#{format}")
      
      `convert #{original_file} -resize #{size} #{modified_file}`
      
      send_file modified_file, :type => 'application/octet-stream', :x_sendfile=>true
    
    rescue => e
      render json: {error: e.message}, status: :unprocessable_entity
    end
  end
end
